name: react-native-web-z-index-fix
description: Fixes React Native Web giving every View z-index:0 (which traps earlier siblings below later ones). Import once on web to reset z-index:auto on RNW's css-view-* classes so stacking follows declaration order, like on native.

scripts.fallow: fallow dead-code --baseline fallow-baselines/dead-code.json --fail-on-issues --quiet && fallow dupes --baseline fallow-baselines/dupes.json --fail-on-issues --quiet && fallow health --baseline fallow-baselines/health.json --quiet
scripts.fallow:baseline: fallow dead-code --save-baseline fallow-baselines/dead-code.json && fallow dupes --save-baseline fallow-baselines/dupes.json && fallow health --save-baseline fallow-baselines/health.json
scripts.lint: npm run eslint && npm run typecheck && npm run fallow

author: kasper@diestoeckels.de
